description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof with a rooftop terrace, surrounded by lush landscaping and mature trees. The front facade includes a covered porch, a double garage, and a paved driveway leading to the street. Large windows are arranged asymmetrically, providing ample natural light to the interior spaces. The backyard is enclosed by dense foliage, offering privacy and a tranquil outdoor area. The structure is primarily constructed from concrete and glass, with metal accents and a visible outdoor pool on the rooftop. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern flat-roof bungalow with a rooftop terrace, large windows, and a covered porch, surrounded by dense trees and landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, double garage, paved driveway, and main entrance, with landscaping and trees in the background.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the dense tree coverage and the rooftop terrace, with the driveway and garage partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by tall trees, with the back of the bungalow and rooftop terrace barely visible through the foliage.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the side and rear of the bungalow, the rooftop terrace, and the transition from driveway to backyard greenery.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
